    "RX.3": "The revision accurately describes the scope of the work and its alignment with the requested set.",

    "RX.5": "The revision mentions that major rewrites are traced but does not specify if minor edits are also traced."

  "confidence": {"R1.4": 0.9, "R1.7": 0.8, "RX.1": 0.6, "RX.3": 0.9, "RX.4": 0.9, "RX.5": 0.7},

rationale.R1.4: The revision identifies three prior works and articulates the delta compared to them.
rationale.R1.7: The revision mentions a missing citation but does not provide specific details about other citations.
rationale.RX.1: The revision does not explicitly discuss uncertainty for any claims.

rationale.RX.4: The revision does not identify any potential harm introduced by the work.
rationale.RX.5: The revision mentions that major rewrites are traced but does not specify if minor edits are also traced.
